stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
When barricades are used to indicate closure of a taxiway or other airport areas, what is the location of the flags and what is the interval between each flag?

options.b: Placed on top of the barricade at 10-meter intervals.
options.c: Placed on top of the barricade at 20-meter intervals.
options.d: Placed on top of the barricade at specified intervals based on the length of the barricade, typically at 10 to 20-meter intervals.
